fields.title: Document detached mode-agent settings and verify gate
fields.description: Plan: detached mode-agent capabilities. Document promptModes vs agents settings split, verify targeted tests and npm run gate, and prepare for final integration review.
fields.notes: Gate verified from /home/ribelo/projects/ribelo/tau/extensions/tau via npm run gate: typecheck pass, lint 0 warnings/0 errors, tests 22 files / 145 tests passing. Task 3 deliverables are README mode-agent settings docs plus sandbox-policy comment update. Any agent-registry delta in the worktree belongs to tau-bms.7 implementation and the small type assertions needed to make that task gate-clean.
fields.close_reason: Documented mode-agent settings split, updated sandbox-policy comment, and verified npm run gate is green.
